data.revised_prompt:
Create one clean HD 2D game sprite animation sheet, exactly 2 rows by 2 columns with 4 equal invisible cells, read left-to-right across rows. Solid flat chroma-key background only: pure #FF00FF magenta, no gradient, no texture, no floor, no shadow, no borders, no visible grid lines. Subject: a normal style elite thunder demon general for Samsara Ascension, an imposing armored xianxia demon in dark bronze armor with a compact horned helm silhouette, short heavy polearm held close to the torso, tiny purple-blue thunder accents hugging the armor. Clean HD hand-painted 2D fantasy RPG boss sprite, readable at small size, not cute, not photorealistic, not 3D, not pixel art.

Critical layout: in each cell, the complete subject occupies only the central 50–55% of the cell with very large empty magenta padding on all sides. Keep horns, shoulders, weapon, cape, tassels, sparks, and feet far away from all cell edges. Nothing touches or approaches any cell boundary. Full body visible in every frame, three-quarter RPG view from slightly above, centered in each cell, stable bottom/feet anchor line, same body height and pixel scale in every frame.

Animation frames and pose changes must be real body pose changes only:
1) Top-left: compact attack wind-up, knees bent, torso coils, polearm pulled tight across the chest.
2) Top-right: short contained thrust or chop, body lunges a little, but weapon tip remains well inside the cell.
3) Bottom-left: follow-through recoil, armor cloth and tassel swing, tiny attached thunder sparks stay close to the body.
4) Bottom-right: guard recovery pose, polearm close to shoulder, ready to loop back into combat.

Consistency: preserve exact same identity, silhouette family, palette, armor marks, face/eyes, helm, weapon design, and material language in every cell; only pose, compact cloth motion, weapon angle, and tiny attached thunder accents may change. Containment: entire subject and any weapon, horn, hair, cape, tassel, sleeve, or tiny attached aura must fit fully inside each cell; no detached projectile, no impact burst, no large slash arc, no long trail, no dust cloud. Forbidden: text, labels, numbers, arrows, UI, watermark, borders, extra characters, cropped body parts, inconsistent scale, redesigned subject, alternate forms, photorealism, 3D render, pixel art. Maintain clean sprite-sheet composition with clear separation between the four poses and no overlap across cells.
